subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thou didst send down Thy verses, manifest Thy proof, and perfect [Thy Cause] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به نزلت آیاتک و اظهرت برهانک و اتممت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
